name: Future Generation Australia Limited
analysis: FGX has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$1.3443. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Trade setup: entry A$1.3443, stop A$1.2919, target A$1.3972. Risk/reward is 1.01:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
